summary: Backup & Restore feature testing completed. All core features working: Create, List, Download, Upload, Restore, and Delete backups. Backend: 18/19 tests pass. Frontend: All UI features verified working.

minor.issue: Returns 500 instead of 400 when uploaded backup file has missing 'collections' key. Should return 400 Bad Request with descriptive error.

issues:
Minor HTML nesting warning:

cannot contain nested

or

elements. AlertDialogDescription using

tag while containing block-level elements. Consider using

for DialogDescription content.
Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1 x -1) - existing minor UX issue, non-blocking

action_items: Minor: Update backend upload validation to return 400 instead of 500 for malformed backup files (missing collections key)
Minor: Fix AlertDialogDescription HTML nesting warning in SystemAdmin.jsx restore modal
critical_code_review_comments: data-testid attributes present on all interactive elements - good testability
API client (api.js) has adminAPI functions properly defined for all backup endpoints
Error handling in UI shows toast messages for both success and failure states
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted TEST-UI-Backup-2 during testing. Created TEST_ prefixed backups via API tests (cleaned up automatically).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backup & Restore feature fully verified. System Admin page at /system-admin. Uploaded backups show 'Uploaded' badge (purple). All CRUD operations work. Restore requires typing 'RESTORE' to confirm, reset requires 'RESET'. Backend stores backups at /app/backend/backups/{company_id}/.

Create Backup (Backend API).test_create_backup_with_name: PASS - Creates backup with custom name
Create Backup (Backend API).test_create_backup_without_name: PASS - Creates backup with auto-generated name

List Backups (Backend API).test_list_backups_endpoint: PASS - Returns all backups sorted by created_at desc

Get Backup Details (Backend API).test_get_backup_details: PASS - Returns backup details by ID

Restore Backup (Backend API).test_restore_preview: PASS - Returns preview of data to restore

System Info (Backend API).test_system_info_endpoint: PASS - Returns collection stats and backup info

Create Backup (Frontend UI).modal_opens: PASS - Create Backup modal opens correctly
Create Backup (Frontend UI).form_fields: PASS - Name and Description inputs work
Create Backup (Frontend UI).list_updates: PASS - New backup appears in list

Upload Backup (Frontend UI).modal_opens: PASS - Upload Backup modal opens correctly
Upload Backup (Frontend UI).file_picker: PASS - File input accepts .json and .gz formats

Restore Backup (Frontend UI).modal_opens: PASS - Restore modal opens from backup row
Restore Backup (Frontend UI).preview_shown: PASS - Shows data to be restored with record counts
Restore Backup (Frontend UI).warning_displayed: PASS - Shows warning about data replacement

Uploaded Badge (Frontend UI).badge_visible: PASS - Shows 'Uploaded' badge on uploaded backups
